name: FoodLab Meal Planner
description: AI-powered meal planning that adapts to everyone's dietary needs. Search for recipes, generate weekly menus with shopping lists, match ingredients you have to recipes, and rate dishes. Supports multiple dietary profiles per household.
author: giancolombi

find-recipe.description: Search the web for a new recipe matching a cuisine, style, or ingredient
find-recipe.usage: Find me a Thai curry recipe
find-recipe.instructions: Search the web for recipes matching the user's request. Read profiles/ for dietary restrictions. Write the recipe with one version per dietary group. Commit and push.

weekly-menu.description: Generate a weekly meal plan (4 mains + 1 breakfast) with a consolidated shopping list
weekly-menu.instructions: Read all profiles, recipes, and ratings. Pick 4 mains + 1 breakfast with cuisine variety. Generate a simplified cook-friendly document with a consolidated shopping list grouped by store section.

whats-for-dinner.description: Pick a recipe for tonight with full ingredients and cooking method
whats-for-dinner.instructions: Read profiles and recipes. Pick 1 highly-rated recipe. Present with ingredients and method for each dietary group.

what-can-i-make.description: Enter ingredients you have and get matching recipes ranked by coverage
what-can-i-make.usage: I have chicken, sweet potatoes, and coconut milk — what can I make?
what-can-i-make.instructions: Match user ingredients against recipe bases. Rank by match ratio. Show top 3 with matched/missing ingredients.

rate.description: Rate a recipe 1-5 stars with optional notes
rate.usage: Rate the moroccan tagine 5 stars — loved it
rate.instructions: Add a row to reviews/ratings.md with dish slug, stars, person, version, notes, and date.

add-profile.description: Set up dietary restrictions for a family member
add-profile.usage: Add a profile for me — I'm vegetarian
add-profile.instructions: Create profiles/<name>.md with restrictions, preferences, allergies, and substitution notes.

dietary_system.description: Per-person dietary profiles stored in profiles/. Each person gets their own recipe version. Supports: vegetarian, no soy, no dairy, no gluten, no nuts, no eggs, no fish, no pork, and custom restrictions.
